no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-c5f9c009 — no_changes rationale
==========================================

Done:
- The acceptance criteria for this bead are already satisfied in HEAD
  (e4ac7dad). cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/beads.spec.ts contains the
  test "bead detail renders dependency DAG: parent and child/depends-on
  relationships are visible" (lines 812-905), added by commit f2487372
  ("test(e2e): add bead dependency DAG view test [ddx-c5f9c009]") which
  is an ancestor of the current base-rev.

  The test:
  - mocks GraphQL to return a bead with parent=PARENT_ID and two
    dependencies (blocks, relates) pointing at bead-dep-A and bead-dep-B
  - navigates to the bead detail panel
  - asserts the "Parent" term and PARENT_ID are visible
  - asserts the "Dependencies" term, dep ids, and edge-type labels
    "(blocks)" / "(relates)" are visible

  This satisfies the AC: "renders bead dependency DAG view; verifies
  parent/child bead relationships visible".

Why no commit this attempt:
- The previous review note (REVIEW:BLOCK) reported that an earlier
  attempt's diff contained only an execution result.json artifact.
  However the test itself was committed in f2487372 and is already
  merged into the base-rev for this attempt. There is nothing further
  to add — adding a duplicate test would be churn.

Follow-up needed:
- Reviewer should re-check beads.spec.ts at HEAD; if the test as
  written is considered insufficient (e.g. wants a graphical/SVG DAG
  rather than the current parent + dependency-list rendering), the
  bead description should be sharpened to specify the missing
  affordance, otherwise the bead can be closed as satisfied.
